title: ARTICLE 11.1.
doc_html:
ARTICLE XI.  ELECTIONS

§1.  Election Code

Section 1.  The legislature shall adopt an election code which shall provide for permanent registration of voters and for the conduct of all elections.
doc_text:
ARTICLE XI.  ELECTIONS
§1.  Election Code
Section 1.  The legislature shall adopt an election code which shall provide for permanent registration of voters and for the conduct of all elections.
